query:
SELECT s.status, s.installationStatus, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM surveys s
GROUP BY s.status, s.installationStatus
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AnaPRc1Kpw1Jvjc.659756d42373 --database 6acGApiU8Bjnxuzxb5vkwU --execute
